name: ci-gaming-block
description: Blocks CI-gaming: rerunning/cancelling runs, disabling workflows, bypassing protections, self-approval.
author: dzackgarza

rules.name: block-gh-run-rerun
rules.reason: CI reruns chase green instead of diagnosing — the failure is evidence. Read the failing check's logs and fix the cause; suspected flaky infra → stop, ask the user. LOAD `pr-feedback-triage` skill.

rules.name: block-gh-run-cancel-delete
rules.reason: CI runs are evidence — never cancel or delete them. Let runs finish; a stuck run is a blocker to report to the user.

rules.name: block-gh-workflow-disable
rules.reason: Workflows are mandatory QC — never disable them. Failing workflow → fix the cause or report the blocker to the user. LOAD `quality-control` skill.

rules.name: block-gh-pr-merge-admin
rules.reason: Never bypass branch protection. Merge only after checks pass and all feedback is addressed with commits. LOAD `pr-feedback-triage` skill.

rules.name: block-gh-pr-approve
rules.reason: Agents never approve PRs — approval belongs to the user and reviewers. Respond to reviews with comments + committed remediation. LOAD `pr-feedback-triage` skill.
